title: Part 3 – Conversation : organiser un dîner client
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: Have you booked a restaurant for the client dinner on Thursday? Man: Yes, I made a reservation at La Provence for seven o'clock, for six people. Woman: Great. Do you know if they have a private room? Mr. Bennett mentioned he'd like to discuss some contract details during dinner. Man: I'm not sure, but I'll call them this afternoon to ask. If they don't have one, I can look for another restaurant nearby. Woman: Thanks. Also, could you check if they can accommodate a vegetarian guest? One of our clients doesn't eat meat. Man: I'll mention that when I call. I'll let you know what they say by the end of the day.

questions.prompt: What has the man already done?
questions.explanation: Il confirme avoir réservé une table à La Provence pour jeudi à 19h, pour six personnes.

questions.prompt: What does the woman ask the man to find out?
choices: Whether there is a private room
questions.explanation: Elle demande s'il sait si le restaurant dispose d'un salon privé pour discuter du contrat.

questions.prompt: What special request does the woman mention?
choices: A vegetarian option for a guest
questions.explanation: Elle demande de vérifier si le restaurant peut proposer une option végétarienne pour un client.
